description: You are an NLP engineer maintaining a sentiment analysis library called 'sentiment_pipeline' located at /home/ga/PycharmProjects/sentiment_pipeline. A recent update has severely degraded the model's accuracy, particularly for negative reviews; the system now misclassifies feedback like 'not good' or 'bad service' as Positive or Neutral. Restore the model's performance by identifying and fixing the regressions within the pipeline components. Ensure all tests in the tests/ directory pass without modifying the test files. The project uses scikit-learn.
